name: services_create
description: Create a new service on Render. Specify the service type, name, Git repository, build and start commands, environment runtime, region, plan, and auto-deploy settings.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Service type: web_service, static_site, private_service, background_worker, or cron_job.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Service name. Must be unique within your account.

parameters.name: autoDeploy
parameters.description: Enable auto-deploy on push: yes or no.

parameters.name: serviceDetails
parameters.description: Service config: buildCommand, startCommand, env, plan, region, numInstances, healthCheckPath, publishPath.

parameters.name: envVars
parameters.description: Array of {key, value} environment variable objects.
